name: composite-dispatch with an unreadable profile path does not crash; it still produces a routed verdict
command: printf 'import os\n' > x.py && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file x.py --profile /no/such/p.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; { [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] || [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] || [ "$ec" -eq 3 ]; } && grep -q 'dispatch file=' e.txt && echo missing-profile-no-crash 1>&2; else echo missing-profile-no-crash 1>&2; fi
